featureName: Account Status Indicator + Filter for Quotes/Confirmation
description: Add has_account badge in ContactSection and ContactSelector. Filter quote requests and confirmation to only users with accounts.

userStories.title: Add 'Non invité' badge in ContactSection and ContactSelector
userStories.description: Show a visible 'Non invité' badge on contact cards in ContactSection (used in ProgrammingModal participant boxes) and in ContactSelector dropdown items (used in selection modals). Also update intervention creation/modification forms.
acceptanceCriteria: ContactSection shows 'Non invité' badge for contacts where has_account is false
ContactSelector dropdown items show 'Non invité' badge for contacts without accounts
has_account field added to BaseContact interface and ContactSelector contact interface
userStories.notes: Badge added to ContactSection (contact-section.tsx:350) and ContactSelector (ui/contact-selector.tsx:218). has_account added to both interfaces. Fixed provider mapping in detail page to pass has_account (was missing). assignment-section-v2.tsx already had has_account in its Contact interface.

userStories.title: Filter quote requests and confirmation to account holders only
userStories.description: In the server action createQuoteRequestsForProviders path, filter out providers without has_account. Also ensure confirmation requirements only target account holders (already done in ProgrammingModal but verify backend).
acceptanceCriteria: Quote requests are only created for providers with auth_user_id (has_account)
Server action filters providers before calling createQuoteRequestsForProviders
Confirmation requirements already filter has_account in ProgrammingModal (verify)
userStories.notes: Server action (intervention-actions.ts:2721-2737): queries users with auth_user_id IS NOT NULL before creating quotes. API route (intervention-quote-request/route.ts:169): filters eligibleProviders by auth_user_id. Confirmation already pre-filtered in ProgrammingModal (lines 422-434) using has_account !== false.
